mapper.select: SELECT id, question_content, category, display_order, active FROM survey_questions WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY display_order
SELECT id, question_id, choice_content, score, display_order FROM survey_choices WHERE question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY display_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey_responses (`쉼표번호`, question_id, choice_id, responded_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{questionId}, #{choiceId}, #{respondedAt})
